query:
ALTER TABLE engagements 
  ADD COLUMN roe_status ENUM('none', 'pending', 'signed', 'expired') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  ADD COLUMN roe_signed_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN roe_expiry_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN roe_document_url TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN roe_scope JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN roe_signer_name VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN roe_signer_email VARCHAR(320) NULL;

  ADD COLUMN roe_scope JSON NULL,
